description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, clang-9, and hotfix/clang-9 branches and on pull requests to master. Use two jobs: one that builds and tests on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04, and another that builds and tests on ubuntu-18.04 with clang-9. For each job, check out the code, set up cmake, compile, run tests, and save test artifacts.
